texto: ‎"The more we search for ourselves, the less likely we are to find ourselves; and the more we search for God, and to serve our fellow-men, the more profoundly will we become acquainted with ourselves, and the more inwardly assured. This is one of the great spiritual laws of life." (From a letter written on behalf of Shoghi Effendi to an individual believer, February 18, 1954)
explicacao: Citação de Shoghi Effendi sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “‎"The more we search for ourselves, the less likely we are to find ourselves; and the more we sea…” articula reflexao, self-awareness, ourselves em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
